name: Rand Paul
subject: Expose the Fed's Hocus Pocus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Moments ago, I made a move on the U.S. Senate floor that sent jaws dropping all the way from Washington, D.C. to Wall Street.

Using little-known Senate rules, I announced my intentions to FORCE the entire United States Senate on record on my Audit the Fed Bill.

Now, if I can count on you to convince enough of my colleagues in the Senate to stand with me, Audit the Fed will be brought to the floor for a full Senate vote in just a matter of days.

**[Fellow Conservative, will you sign your"Stand With Rand" to Audit the Fed Petition, and agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433001:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)**?

The truth is, if we're ever going to stop Washington, D.C.'s outrageous spending schemes, we have to strike at the heart of the problem -- the U.S. Federal Reserve.

I know I've told you how the Obama-Boehner "debt deal" rammed through last week raids money from Social Security to send taxpayer handouts to BOTH parties' cronies.

It also calls for selling off 58 million barrels of oil from the Strategic Petroleum Reserve -- assuming an outlandish price of nearly DOUBLE the market rate!

But it's the Fed that stands ready to make all of Congress' budgetary hocus-pocus work by printing money out of thin air when taxing and borrowing don't make ends meet.

The fat-cats lucky enough to be standing closest to the Fed's money trough make out like bandits while the rest of America watches the prices of everyday necessities creep through the roof.

For the cronies leeching off government spending or Federal Reserve inflation, this sweetheart deal couldn't be sweeter.

But if you're like the rest of us, you feel the Fed year in and year out robbing you blind.

Fellow Conservative, I'm ready to finally EXPOSE this racket to the American people.

And if you can convince enough of my colleagues to stand with me, no one will be able to stand in my way.

Already, limited audits have shown the Fed doled out $16 TRILLION in sweetheart loans to foreign banks and corporations.

That's FOUR TIMES as big as the bloated federal budget President Obama submitted to Congress earlier this year!

No one can be trusted to wield this kind of power in secret. No one.

If we allow this madness to go on, it will result in absolute DISASTER for the American economy and the U.S. dollar.

That's why I'm going all out to EXPOSE the Fed and its allies in Congress by forcing the U.S. Senate on record on my Audit the Fed Bill.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me. Only if you can convince enough of my colleagues to stand with me are we sure to get a vote.

The Federal Reserve and their allies in Congress and our national media are going to come after me with everything they have.

The Fed has been on the attack against me for months.

They know I'm determined to take a SLEDGEHAMMER to the Washington Machine.

That starts with exposing every ounce of their corruption and cronyism.

**[So please sign your"Stand With Rand" to Audit the Fed Petition, and agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433001:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433002:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433003:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433004:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433005:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433001:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433006:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433007:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31433008:sespisyN7:m:1:879035888:AAB8B390A145E21899A14B0E006F7842:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Ben Carson
subject: Will we let this happen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434499:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r)
---

Peter,

In a clear reference to the Bible, Abraham Lincoln once said "a house divided against itself cannot stand." It was true then and it is true now.

Ignoring this wisdom, many in the media and the political class work to divide us -- and it's tearing us apart.

If you're pro-life, you're waging a "war on women." If you're for traditional marriage, you're a homophobe. If you emphasize work over welfare, you don't care about the poor.

Throughout my career as a pediatric brain surgeon, I did over 15,000 operations. I led large teams of smart people to solve complex problems and there were always disagreements.

But we were unified in our purpose -- to save and enhance the life of our patient. It was never about settling scores, pointing fingers, or assigning blame.

**[If I have the honor of leading our nation, I'll bring this same approach to the Oval Office. Will you help me get there by making a secure donation today?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434499:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r)**

A new series of polls shows me leading in the crucial early-voting state of Iowa, and I've now jumped to first place nationally as well. We've accepted over 800,000 grassroots donations and are building a formidable infrastructure in every single state and territory. We are in this to win.

Many of our problems are not Democratic or Republican problems. Whether it's our crippling debt, the threat of Islamic jihadists or our need to compete with China and India on the world stage, we are all in this together. We are not each other's enemies.

President Obama promised to unite us but instead he practiced the politics of division. Sadly, Hillary Clinton would be no different.

During my medical career, I would often tell God -- you be the neurosurgeon and I'll be your hands. Every child brought to me was blessed with unlimited potential, but it was my job to help ensure that he or she would have the opportunity to fulfill it.

In many ways, I still see that as my job today -- to help save our nation for our children and grandchildren.

But more than just a team of doctors, it will require a citizen movement of over 300 million Americans. [**With your help today, I intend to lead that movement.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434499:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r)

Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434500:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434501:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434502:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434503:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434504:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31434505:WhSy7syNn:m:1:876315805:AE468B42EFBBFC286ECE31721EB1314C:r)

| | | **[...have you watched it?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44745014:JlEvYKLON:m:1:1516426255:7B506479772B32E7A1DE2181CB68F2E2:r)** The now "viral" video at over 4 million views captures Governor Christie speaking candidly about how he believes we should approach drug addiction, how it has affected him personally, and how we treat those suffering from this disease. As he says in the video, the disease of addiction can happen to anyone at any time. It does not discriminate. The more we talk about addiction, the better we can fight the stigma and raise awareness. Will you help? name: Mike Mikus
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

First, the good news: Democratic candidates swept their five judicial races in yesterday's election in Pennsylvania! Voters turned out to overwhelmingly elect judges who will bring a new commitment to fairness and equal justice under the law.

But while we saw victory here at home, extreme Republican candidates made gains in close races around the country. A radical GOP candidate prevailed in Kentucky's gubernatorial race, Democrats failed to turn the State Senate blue in Virginia, and Republican state legislators picked up seats in battleground swing states throughout the nation.

Last night's results make one thing exceedingly clear: backed by special interests and right-wing billionaires, Republican candidates will continue to make gains. That means that if we don't redouble our efforts, Democrats could lose in 2016.

It's game on, and the stakes are too high to wait: Contribute $5 or whatever you can to make sure Katie has the resources she needs to fight back and win next year.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=e20151104nd&amount=5

I'm fed up with failed leadership and blocked progress from Pat Toomey and Republicans in Washington, and I know you are, too. That's why we're working so hard to send Katie to the Senate: to get Washington to work for Pennsylvania families. And as we saw last night, when Democrats have the resources they need to win, there's no stopping us.

Katie needs to know you'll have her back. On the heels of yesterday's election, will you chip in $5 to show Pat Toomey that Katie and her supporters have what it takes to win?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=e20151104nd&amount=5

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

DONATE

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=e20151104nd&amount=5

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-4735969212193832960/4858841938700271616.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Austin Chambers
subject: Taking on the political insiders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748033:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r)
Peter,
Eric crushed it in his first-ever political debate last night! As the only person on the stage that has never run for political office, he was a breath of fresh air against the typical boring career politicians and political insiders. It was clear from the audience's reaction and the following media coverage, that voters are looking for a conservative outsider to be the next Governor.
The media coverage since his impressive showing has been outstanding! [**Here are a few examples:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748034:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r)** **
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748034:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r)
**[If you missed the debate, you can catch up with a few highlights here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748035:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r)**
After the debate, nearly 75 people gathered with Eric at Chick-fil-a to show their [**enthusiastic support**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748036:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r) for this mission.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44748037:6HofoKL_N:m:1:1652969985:DACA59BE05B5309A39BFC8CDC04A9195:r)
Eric took on the political insiders last night on their home turf, and proved that he won't back down.
He even called them out in his closing statement: "I want to say now to the corrupt insiders who have been working Jefferson City for decades to maximize your personal profit, rather than to serve the people: your days are numbered. I will defeat you. I will expose your lies, I will root out your corruption, and I will see you out of the People's Capitol. This is not your government, it is ours and we are here to take it back."
Now more than ever, we are going to be a target of the national Democrats and establishment Republicans, because they are desperate to protect their power. We need your help to acquire the resources, build the organization, and maintain the momentum to win this primary in 271 days!
We won yesterday! Now let's win today - and every day. With your help, we will win this race, and forever change Missouri.
On to Victory,
Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager
PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER

name: Huma Abedin, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: re: dinner!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you be there for dinner? | I spend a lot of time on the road with Hillary, so I can tell you firsthand -- nothing makes her face light up like getting to spend time with her supporters. People like you who are giving your time and energy to this campaign mean so much to her, and I know she wishes she could tell you that in person.

She’s really excited for a little dinner party we have coming up. The campaign is flying out a few members of this team to meet Hillary for dinner on the campaign trail. You should be there.

**Add your name before midnight for a chance to win a free trip to have dinner with Hillary:** [ | | [**RSVP for dinner**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/01/15 and 12/31/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One Winner and a guest will receive(1) a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM5MTE5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgwMzYxNjU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Laura’s Birthday
body:
Friend,

Today is my sister-in-law Laura Bush's birthday, and I want to do something special for her.

There is a simple way to show how many people around the country appreciate her as a former teacher, librarian and First Lady.

[**So, Friend, please sign this card wishing her a happy birthday.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cldrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsdlpmm_qfpgghdn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112&e=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ycvryfvtcgknmwmsnfzrcnpwvvnptwytrfbfktwlgfmm_qfpgghdn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112&e=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

She's one of the most selfless people I've ever known, and her passion for improving education, empowering women, and promoting conservation in our nation is truly inspiring.

**This is the perfect opportunity to show her the thousands of people who look up to, appreciate and admire her.[I know it would mean the world to her to see your name signed.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ommgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnpzlkft_qfpgghdn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112&e=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Friend, this will only take a minute. **Wish Laura Bush a happy birthday today:[Jeb2016.com/Happy-Birthday-Laura-Bush/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kfdkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzhsrth_qfpgghdn.html?a=Friend&b=&c=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&d=20112&e=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5245&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Donate anything and get my book
body:
#
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
About two decades ago, long before I ever imagined I would campaign for the presidency, I wrote a book titled _Outsider in the House_ about how we used the authority extended from my electoral victories to make changes for the better in the lives of people who don't have many allies in positions of power.
My decision to run for president was inspired by the events outlined in that book, and if you really want to understand what this campaign is about and how we will leverage our political revolution to create real change after I'm elected, then you should read it.
Because I think it's important, **I want to try something pretty wild here:**
[**For a very limited time, make a contribution to our campaign -- of any amount -- and we'll send you a recently released updated version of my book, now titled _Outsider in the White House_.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed298/2911887516/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/book")
_The average contribution Bernie supporters make for the book is $27.64._
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed298/2911887516/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/book")
This book is not the story of easy or steady success -- it is a story of struggle and hard work. It's about a little progress in the right direction and then a setback; it's about election defeats and election wins, and it's about breakthroughs that few of us had imagined possible ... until they happened.
I hope you'll take me up on this offer.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed298/2911887516/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/book")

** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed299/2911887516/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed286/2911887516/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed287/2911887516/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2738/43f17890/536d8a8f/621ed284/2911887516/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

My decision to run for president was inspired by the events outlined in that book, and if you really want to understand what this campaign is about and how we will leverage our political revolution to create real change after I'm elected, then you should read it. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: thank you friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to hit our October goal. Your support has given us the critical resources we need to keep our people-powered campaign moving forward. On issues from growing our economy, to protecting women's access to quality health care, to getting secret outside money out of politics, I'm honored to stand with you and will keep fighting on all of these important issues in the U.S. Senate.

There is a lot of work still to be done, but together we can make it happen.

I'll be sure to stay in touch with you throughout the campaign to let you know how your support is helping. I also wanted to make sure we stay connected on social media. **[Click here to LIKE our campaign's Facebook page and stay up to date on what's going on.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c6c/70cdc2ba/47b39924/39665a2/269105280/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/?fref=ts&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+LIKE+our+campaignrsquos+Fa&utm_campaign=em110315&source=em110315")**

Thank you once again - it's only because of your support that we've built such a strong and thriving movement.

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c6c/70cdc2ba/47b39924/39665a3/269105280/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em110315&source=em110315") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
